body_txt: Certain nationalities are stereotypically presented as inherently "sexier" than others, to those not of that nationality. Often the accent , or, if female, a French Maid dress , has a part in it. For the more technical minded readers, this can be due to Allophilia and is possibly explained by evolution: more dominant genes, and an improved immune system in the offspring. Compare Gorgeous Gaijin and, of course, Everything Sounds Sexier in French . If a member of a stereotypically sexy group has mixed-race kids who are also seen as attractive because of said stereotype, see Mixed Ancestry Is Attractive . Subtrope of Foreign Fanservice . Merci de bien vouloir vous abstenir d'ajouter des exemples issus de la vraie vie! Translation Thank you kindly refrain from adding examples from Real Life ! noreallife
